info.text: I design elegant, hand‑crafted SVG icons that give your interface clarity, personality, and precision. Each icon is drawn from scratch, resulting in a lightweight, cleanly‑anchored, and fully scalable system that feels uniquely yours.
info.title: Hi! I design elegant and hand-crafted SVG icons.
